productDisplayName: Nike Men As Showdown F Black T-Shirts
description: Composition Black V-neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 88% polyester and 12% spandex, graphic print on the front, mesh panel at the back of the neck, nike Swoosh printed on the left chest, brand tab appliqued at the hem, and engineered with Dri-Fit technology Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours Do not use bleach or softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Donot dry clean Whether you're playing at Wimbledon or in your local park, this black t-shirt from nike will give you the comfort and flexibility you require during your matches. The mesh panel at the back ensures better breathability during games, and the eye-catching graphic print ensures that you are the centre of attention. Engineered with Nike's Dri Fit technology, it wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable during the game. Team the tee with comfortable tracks or shorts when you're ruling the court, or with jeans for casual outings.
